_comment: Default-value reference for run_theoremC_refinement_monotonicity.py (C5). Mirrors the C5Config dataclass defaults. The script does NOT auto-load this JSON; to override defaults pass CLI flags. See EXPERIMENT_PLAN_FINAL.MD §7.5. C5 validates theorem-C refinement monotonicity on a full dyadic ladder from coarsest single-block to singleton, across a κ sweep (flat @ κ=1 → staircase @ large κ) and at least two depths.
